title: 4  ATACseq QC
text:
QC for the pipeline output

ATACseq specific steps - filtering mito reads, blacklisted regions if you have one, to shift reads or not to shift
The rabbit hole of peak calling: MACS2/Genrich - what they do, which to use
Decision tree: look at QC to evaluate individual samples, if there are signs that a sample hasn’t worked or isn’t the same quality -> exclude that from peak calling

title: 5  Peak Calling
text:
The rabbit hole

Do you: invidiually call peaks on individual samples for the same condition and then keep only the peaks that have been called in at least 2 samples?
Consensus peak set: rabbit hole
Which peak calling method to use? MACS2, Genrich, csaw
Look at peaks in IGV
